signals.raw: What is confirmed:** The **Cleveland Cavaliers lead the Toronto Raptors 2-0** in their first-round Eastern Conference playoff series[1][4]. Donovan Mitchell scored 30 points and James Harden added 28 as the Cavaliers won Game 2 by a score of 115-105[1][2]. Game 3 is scheduled for Thursday, April 23 at 8:00 pm ET in Toronto[2].

Additionally, Brandon Ingram's performance has been notably poor, described as "one of the worst NBA playoff games ever," which is creating concerns for the Raptors' chances[1][5].
